title: Directory-level architectural abstraction for lib/aggregate
description: The lib/aggregate directory is responsible for providing a set of built-in value aggregators and a generic utility class to help users create map/reduce jobs using the Aggregate framework. The files in this directory collaborate by using the generic mapper/reducer/combiner classes to perform various aggregation operations on input data. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a high-level abstraction for performing aggregation operations on large datasets using the Hadoop MapReduce framework.
